note: Seed 0 bimetallic with clear inner-circle boundary and '2'+map relief; outer ring should be silver but strong blue/green cast makes tones unverifiable; it is the largest coin (~25.7mm vs the 50c anchor) so 2euro. Seed 3 completely worn flat, no numeral; relative size ~21.3mm suggests 5cent and it reads redder than the gold coins. Seeds 1,2,4 numerals readable after zoom (10, 20, 50).
